query:
SELECT oi.id, oi.orderId, oi.menuItemId, oi.itemName, oi.itemImageUrl, oi.quantity, oi.unitPrice,
       mi.name as currentMenuItemName, mi.imageUrl as currentMenuItemImage
FROM order_items oi
LEFT JOIN menu_items mi ON oi.menuItemId = mi.id
WHERE oi.orderId IN (
  SELECT id FROM orders WHERE orderNumber = 'PED32254670'
);
